title: prunella × dissectifolia
intro: Prunella × dissectifolia, also known as selfheal or prunella, is a perennial plant in the mint family native to East Asia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Prunella × dissectifolia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Prunella × dissectifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
